description: Returns the metadata for the specified table and table properties, including the list of columns in the table schema, their data types, and column descriptions.

Arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the table.
Arn.markdownDescription:
The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the table.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes

TableName.markdownDescription:
The name of the table.

---

Required: Yes  
Type: String  
Maximum Length: 1024  
Pattern: ^[\S\s]*$  
Update requires: Replacement

Description.markdownDescription:
The table description.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Maximum Length: 1024  
Pattern: ^[\S\s]*$  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes

Schema.markdownDescription:
The schema of the table.

---

Required: No  
Type: Array  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes

Column.description: Includes basic information for a data column such as its description, name, and type.

Name.markdownDescription:
The column name.

Required: No

Maximum Length: 1024

Update requires: No interruption

Update requires: No interruption
